_doc: Shadows over Innistrad (SOI) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/soi.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, C1/C2 commons (modified for fewer commons per pack). Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set with three variations of each standard basic land and 33 double-faced cards. The DFC slot is in addition to the standard 14 game cards (commons reduced from 10 to 9 to make room). Land slot is a basic land or checklist. US printing sequential collation with modified C1/C2 common collation. 36 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
